title: FL door sprint — CANDIDATE_ACQUISITION_RECOMMENDED + PHYSICAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED

locked_configuration.summary: 2019 Ford F-450 Chassis Cab Regular Cab 4x2 DRW 145.3 WB / 60 CA

reason: Outlines listing provides a real URL for a 2D dimensional / profile reference (not OEM engineering geometry). Acquire vector + visual model efficiently; physical teardown later for internals. Shell interchange is Hard Rule 15 claim CL-001 (CANDIDATE).
decision: Acquire SRC-CAND-000004 / EDTS-CAND-001 (Outlines) as Priority 2D_DIMENSIONAL_REFERENCE / PROFILE_REFERENCE after purchase — never call it ground-truth geometry.
Acquire / evaluate EDTS-CAND-002 / CAND-000042-EOG visual model when SKU URL is isolated — visual candidate only, not CAD-grade inner structure.
Eventually execute PHYSICAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED teardown/scan for harness routing, latch geometry, inner cavity.
CL-001 (Hard Rule 15): status CANDIDATE; next verification = OEM body repair manual, OEM engineering drawing, physical comparison.
Contamination guards: 2020+ facelift harness, cab-type trim/harness, mirror-option pinouts.
Do not update passport geometry/interaction from ABSENT; no GEO promotion; kernel/passport rc1 unchanged.
Hard Rule 13: acquisition triggers parallel lanes — does not close research.
